positive: Stylized illustration of a wise, ethereal owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by swirling astronomical elements: constellations, small glowing nebulas, and stylized botanical vines. The owl should have clean, deep black silhouettes against a midnight blue and gradient teal background. Emphasis on strong graphic contrast and minimal, elegant detail. Composition must be perfectly centralized and symmetrical, suitable for direct printing on fabric. Style: Neo-Victorian botanical etchings mixed with modern graphic design, linework, highly detailed, vibrant glow effects, cinematic lighting, rule of thirds composition, vector art feel.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, blurry, low resolution, noise, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, cartoon, photo, realism, deep shadows, gradient background, messy, cluttered, grayscale
